title: fimbristylis albicans
intro: Fimbristylis albicans, also known as white fimbri, is a type of grass-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. Fimbristylis albicans is often prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal remedies, or dried and powdered for use in traditional medicine.
